resources.string:
If you stop the service or unplug / disconnect the headset, the button is disabled.

Functionality:
	1 sec		Play / Pause
	3 sec		Next Song
	6 sec		Previous Song
 > 6 sec		None

Without connected headphone: You can play / pause if you on a recognized Wi-Fi.
Cannot access current SSID. You may need to enable location services in background.
